name: Accolite Digital LLC
h1: Accolite Digital's GCC footprint in India
lede: Accolite Digital runs four capability centers across four Indian cities. Chennai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering it, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Accolite Digital office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Accolite Digital LLC GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Accolite Digital runs 4 verified GCC centers across 4 Indian cities (Chennai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Accolite Digital's India footprint covers Chennai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru and Gurugram, spanning it. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.
about.industry: IT, System Integration and Consulting Services, Corporate Services

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 27 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Accolite Digital operate in India?
faq.a: Accolite Digital operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Accolite Digital have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Accolite Digital's India GCC footprint spans Chennai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru and Gurugram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Accolite Digital run in India?
faq.a: Accolite Digital runs it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Accolite Digital's India GCCs?
faq.a: Accolite Digital's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Accolite Digital's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 27 leaders at Accolite Digital's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
